level_signals: 5-8 years as a Product Owner, Business Analyst, or Systems Analyst
First role of this type at Harvey — high ownership, few guidelines
Compensation range $164K-$240K USD consistent with Senior IC at high-growth SaaS

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5-8 years as a Product Owner, Business Analyst, or Systems Analyst. Background in consulting or a high-growth tech company is required.
must_haves.qualifier: Product Owner, Business Analyst, or Systems Analyst

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Background in consulting or a high-growth tech company is required.

Ability to demonstrate a portfolio of AI first principles. You will be expected to both explain the technical nature of different models and platforms, and show micro-apps you have built on Claude, Lovable, n8n, Replit, or other agentic applications.

Proven experience understanding the relationship between technology and users. Strong ability to extrapolate data structures across platforms into a baseline that can be used by both end users and agents.
Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills and experience with BI tools. You don't just pull reports; you tell stories with data.

Exceptional ability to gather requirements from non-technical stakeholders and transform them into elegant, scalable technical solutions. Track record of iteration with technical development teams and delivering projects from inception to hypercare.
This is the first role of this type at Harvey, so you need to be comfortable operating with high ownership and few explicit guidelines.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience operating as a founder or partner in a consulting agency.
Experience as the first member of a new team

scope.surface: Revenue Technology / GTM stack — marketing, sales, and customer success tooling including orchestration, data, and agentic process layers
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS (legal and professional services AI platform)
primary_metrics_inferred: Sales team time spent on high-value interactions
core_responsibilities: Translate business objectives into technical requirements as project liaison and lead analyst
Design advanced automations to drive speed and efficiency, focusing on top-of-funnel optimization
Leverage AI agents and tools (Clay, Claude, Gong, etc.) to automate account research and prospect prioritization
Act as liaison between Marketing, Sales, RevOps, and GTM Systems
Manage data integrity, deduplication, and system audits
Document evolving data models and process flows
Research and verify ROI of adopted tools

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and spans a meaningful senior IC band ($164K-$240K)
First-of-kind role signals high influence and ownership opportunity
Clear description of day-to-day responsibilities and tooling stack
Company has strong product-market fit signals (1500+ customers, 60+ countries)
Explicit call-out of AI-first work with specific tools named
red_flags: Location not specified — remote, hybrid, or onsite status is entirely unclear
Visa sponsorship and work authorization requirements not mentioned
Wide compensation band ($76K spread) may indicate uncertainty about level or location-based pay
No equity or total comp mentioned despite being a high-growth startup role
High buzzword density; some responsibilities are vaguely defined

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years range and comp)
equity_mentioned set to false (no mention of equity or stock in JD)
